description: Machine-readable quality rules governing agent code generation. Single source of truth consumed by prompts (Layer 2) and gates (Layer 3).

rules.name: framework_anti_pattern
rules.constraint: Files MUST NOT co-locate 'use client' directive and 'export const dynamic' in the same file. Server-side exports require separate server component files.
rules.prompt_guidance: When fixing prerendering errors, create a separate server wrapper component instead of adding `export const dynamic` to client component files.
rules.fix_pattern: Split into ClientComponent.tsx (with 'use client') and page.tsx (server, with dynamic export)

rules.name: integration_sdk_decomposition
rules.constraint: Every integration requirement MUST have a companion SDK setup sub-requirement specifying the npm package and initialization pattern.
anti_patterns: Single 'Stripe integration' requirement without SDK companion
Integration requirement that mentions behavior but not package installation
rules.detection_hint: cross-reference requirements with WELL_KNOWN_PACKAGES mapping from manifest_packages.py
rules.prompt_guidance: For every integration (Stripe, Supabase, Calendly, etc.), create TWO requirements: (1) behavioral feature, (2) SDK setup with package name and init pattern.
rules.fix_pattern: REQ-N: Stripe payment flow + REQ-N+1: Install stripe package, init Stripe(process.env.STRIPE_SECRET_KEY)

rules.name: navigation_mandate_timing
rules.constraint: Navigation mandate MUST fire based on requirements ledger page count (always available early), not just route_map (only available after architect_plan.json). Threshold: >1 page.
anti_patterns: Checking only ctx.route_map when it's empty on Wave 1/2 delegations
rules.prompt_guidance: Multi-page applications MUST have a shared navigation component in layout.tsx. Check requirements ledger for page count.

rules.name: env_var_bridge
rules.constraint: Pre-delegation env bridge MUST run before every subordinate dispatch. Pipeline: prompt_secret_extractor → pre_delegation_env_bridge → build_env_var_section.
anti_patterns: Building env modules that duplicate existing ensure_env_before_delegation()
rules.prompt_guidance: All required API keys and secrets MUST be bridged to .env.local before subordinate starts working.
rules.fix_pattern: NO CODE CHANGE NEEDED — pipeline is fully wired with 3 modules + 3 checks

rules.name: anti_mock_tdd
rules.constraint: Production source code MUST NOT contain mock data, placeholder values, TODO comments, or deferred implementations. Three detection systems with 56+ patterns enforce this.
anti_patterns: useState initialized with hardcoded data array
Comments containing 'for now', 'simplified version', 'in production this would'
rules.detection_hint: MockDataGuard (24 patterns) + stub_detection (28 patterns) + quality_gate_mock_linter (4 patterns)
rules.prompt_guidance: Write REAL implementations with actual API calls, database queries, and business logic. Never use placeholder data.
rules.fix_pattern: NO NEW MODULE NEEDED — audit pattern coverage in existing 3 systems, circuit breaker at 3 blocks is correct

rules.name: test_execution_via_code_execution_tool
rules.constraint: Test execution MUST use code_execution_tool to run the project's test runner (npm test, npx jest, or npx vitest). The test command MUST detect the runner from package.json scripts and return structured results.
anti_patterns: Nudger redirecting to non-existent tool actions (dead-end nudge)
Calling removed tools instead of code_execution_tool for test execution
rules.detection_hint: verify test execution uses code_execution_tool with npm test / npx jest / npx vitest
rules.prompt_guidance: Use code_execution_tool to run tests via npm test, npx jest, or npx vitest. Check package.json scripts to determine the correct test command.
rules.fix_pattern: Universal consistency assertion: test guidance references only available tools (code_execution_tool)

rules.name: content_fabrication_detection
rules.constraint: Source code values (prices, URLs, brand names) MUST match the user prompt or content_manifest.json. Values present in source but NOT in prompt/manifest are FABRICATED.
anti_patterns: Agent inventing pricing tiers not specified by user
Agent using placeholder URLs instead of prompt-specified URLs
Building a new check that duplicates Contract Assertions (0.06)
rules.detection_hint: inverse of contract assertions — scan source for prices/URLs, cross-reference against prompt
rules.prompt_guidance: Use ONLY values from the user prompt and content_manifest.json. Never invent pricing, URLs, or brand names.
rules.fix_pattern: Extend existing Contract Assertions with inverse (fabrication) check, reuse prompt_contract_parser.py regex patterns
